name: Texas Tears Chicken Marinade
recipeIngredient: 2 tablespoons habanero hot sauce, or any bottled hot sauce
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine the hot sauce, Italian dressing, lime juice, and chopped cilantro in a bowl.
2. Place 6-8 pieces of chicken in a glass bowl or dish.
3. Pour the marinade over the chicken pieces, covering them completely.
4. Cover the bowl with plastic wrap and refrigerate overnight.
5. When ready to cook, grill or broil the chicken along with onion-ring slices, if desired.
6. Serve the chicken immediately.
NOTES:
- Adjust the amount of hot sauce according to your spice tolerance. Use less sauce for milder heat.
- Yield: 2 cups
Nutritional information (per 1/4-cup serving): 141 calories, 14.3 grams fat, 2.1 grams saturated fat, no cholesterol, 2,323 milligrams sodium, 91 percent of calories from fat.
